import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function EmpDashboard({ setModuleName }) { useEffect(() => { setModuleName("Employee Dashboard"); const userData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("user") || "{}"); console.log(console.log("Emp data from localStorage:", userData)); }, []); return (
Employee Name: {localStorage.getItem("empname")}
Employee ID: {localStorage.getItem("user_id")}
Role: {localStorage.getItem("role")}
Office: {localStorage.getItem("office")}
Quick Links
Download Forms
Helpdesk
Search employee
Leave Register
Pending Approvals
Pending Processings
); } export default EmpDashboard;
